sources.title: SideCharacter Update — 2026-05-22
sources.summary: Latest working theory: gender reroll once, same-gender passive zombify, discover count, mirror character appearance, same-gender final check
key_findings: Proposed route: reroll exactly once, zombify same-gender, discover count, copy/mirror character appearance, plus same-gender final zombify while mirror is active
Evidence: bc=char rule, xy=mirror rule from image solution
Character mirror is a separate mechanic from the count
Passive Blood Bar buildup is a prerequisite

sources.title: New Hint Reassessment — 2026-05-21
sources.summary: CSP model with probability scoring for count candidates and unknown pair candidates
key_findings: Count 50: confidence 0.42, count 49: 0.23, count 45: 0.15, count 40: 0.08
CHAR_MIRROR candidate: 0.55 probability, supported by bc_char, xy_mirror, bc_gender, appearance_copy_seen
Character mirror + same-gender final zombify is top-ranked candidate

sources.title: Final Solution Working Notes

key_findings: 9-step solution route proposed
Tail has 3 directional branches: character mirror, passive grip counter, count-only
Character mirror ranked first direction

sources.title: Hint Image 2 Green Analysis
sources.summary: Image analysis showing character mirroring pattern: bc=char rule, xy=mirror rule
key_findings: bc (uppercase) = character rule (matches race/class)
xy (lowercase) = mirror rule (mirrors partner)
Character copy relationship confirmed in image solution
